name: Maverick Moreno-Alvarez| couples Fight Alt.
description:
An argument turned into the breaking of a man. It didn't have to result to this and yet it did ,did you mean to harm him or did you react out of anger ? Can you fix things with him? Or is he beyond forgiving you?
